title: What Organization Offers The Ceh Certification Exam
source_filename: What Organization Offers The Ceh Certification Exam.docx

qas.q: Which federal law amended Chapter 119 of Title 18, U.S. Code?
qas.a:
U.S. PATRIOT Act, Sec. 217: Interception of Computer Trespasser
Communications

qas.q: To determine whether scanning is illegal in your area, you should do which of the following?
As a security tester, what should you do before installing hacking software on your computer?
qas.a: Check with local law enforcement agencies.

qas.q: How can you find out which computer crime laws are applicable in your state?
qas.a: Contact your local law enforcement agencies.

qas.q: Which federal law prohibits unauthorized access of classified information?
qas.a: Computer Fraud and Abuse Act, Title 18

qas.q: Which organization issues the Top 25 list of software errors?
A written contract isn't necessary when a friend recommends a client. True or False?

A team composed of people with varied skills who attempt to penetrate a network is
called which of the following?
A penetration tester is which of the following?
qas.a: A security professional who's hired to break into a network to discover vulnerabilities

qas.q:
What portion of your ISP contract might affect your ability to conduct a penetration
test over the Internet?
What organization designates a person as a CISSP?
The U.S. Department of Justice defines a hacker as which of the following?
qas.a: A person who accesses a computer or network without the owner's permission

qas.q: Which federal law prohibits intercepting any communication, regardless of how it was transmitted?
What organization offers the CEH certification exam?
If you run a program in New York City that uses network resources to the extent that a user is denied access to them, what type of law have you violated?
